title: MacBook bottom-case screws
fitment_note: Exact screw lengths/counts vary by MacBook model; use a model-specific screw set or OEM/repair-source part.
warnings: MacBook Pro lower-case screws are proprietary/model-specific pentalobe screws, not standard Phillips machine screws.
Do not mix screw lengths; wrong length can damage internal parts.
No verified stocked catalog match is available in this demo catalog.

title: M.2 SSD or laptop standoff screw
canonical_query: m4 button socket cap screw steel black oxide

kit.label: Small electronics screw candidates
kit.note: Confirm thread and length against the standoff

warnings: Board screws are length-sensitive; too long can damage components.
Do not force a screw if pitch or diameter feels wrong.

title: Flat-pack furniture replacement hardware
canonical_query: m6 socket head cap screw steel zinc

clarifying_question.label: Do you have a product name or part number?

kit.label: Furniture hardware candidate pack
kit.note: Match one existing bolt or manual part number before buying

warnings: Flat-pack hardware varies by model and assembly step.
Use the manual part number if available.

title: Bike bottle-cage bolts
canonical_query: m5 socket head cap screw stainless steel plain

kit.label: Bottle-cage bolt pair
kit.note: Common accessory hardware; confirm frame boss accepts M5

warnings: Accessory bolts are usually low risk, but do not force threads into the frame.

title: Boat hatch screws for saltwater exposure
canonical_query: 316 stainless steel phillips pan machine screw plain

clarifying_question.label: What material is the hatch or frame touching?

choices.label: Fiberglass or plastic
choices.query_rewrite: boat hatch screws saltwater fiberglass frame

choices.label: Aluminum frame
choices.query_rewrite: boat hatch screws saltwater aluminum frame

kit.label: Corrosion-resistant hatch screw candidates
kit.note: Prefer 316 stainless in saltwater; verify size and head style

warnings: Zinc-plated hardware is a poor long-term choice around saltwater.
Check nearby metals for galvanic corrosion risk.

title: Outdoor patio-chair rusted screws
canonical_query: 18-8 stainless steel phillips pan machine screw plain

choices.label: Chair frame or seat panel
choices.query_rewrite: patio chair rusted frame screws stainless

kit.label: Outdoor replacement screw candidates
kit.note: Match one existing screw for diameter and length

warnings: Outdoor replacements should prioritize corrosion resistance over plain zinc.

title: Appliance panel or handle screws
canonical_query: 18-8 stainless steel phillips pan machine screw plain

kit.label: Panel screw candidate set
kit.note: Use the appliance model number for higher confidence

warnings: Do not replace gas, pressure, or electrical safety hardware with generic candidates.
Appliance panels can use heat- or corrosion-specific hardware.

title: Industrial guard or access-panel fasteners
canonical_query: steel zinc hex cap screw flat washer

clarifying_question.label: Is this the same asset and location as the prior repair?

choices.label: Same pump guard
choices.query_rewrite: same screws we used for pump guard P-104

choices.label: Different access panel
choices.query_rewrite: machine access panel screws steel zinc

kit.label: Guard panel hardware candidate kit
kit.note: History-based recommendation; verify asset and location

warnings: Customer history is not proof of verified fit.
Use OEM or engineering guidance for load-bearing or safety-critical guards.
